- _vDSP_sve
CStrings:
+ "\t"
+ "\n    ]"
+ "\n}"
+ "    "
+ "        "
+ " interactionType: "
+ "!status.suspendReasons.empty()"
+ "#HomeSLAM Learner - Trajectory Similarity - Got %d/%d Walking Trajectory Matches"
+ "#HomeSLAM Learner - Trajectory Similarity - No candidates for walking trajectory matching - Aborting"
+ "#HomeSLAM Learner - Trajectory Similarity - Saving segment %lu corresponding time interval (%Lf, %Lf)"
+ "#HomeSLAM Learner - Trajectory Similarity - generated %lu candidates for matching"
+ "#HomeSlam, Initiating NorthAlignDist with (mean, sigma)=(%f, %f)"
+ "#HomeSlam, Initiating NorthAlignDist with uniform dist"
+ "#HomeSlam, blue dot has low partical percentage and is off map, marking as diverged"
+ "#HomeSlam, blue dot has low partical percentage on initial RF, diverging"
+ "#HomeSlam, got unexpected window end index = 0 during northAlignOdometryMeasurements"
+ "#HomeSlam, particles diverged after IO update!"
+ "#HomeSlam, particles diverged after RF update!"
+ "#HomeSlam, to reset particles there must be ROIs!"
+ "#ULPDRFenceBridge: Clearing PDR fence, with identifier: %@"
+ "#ULPDRFenceBridge: Ending PDR session with source type: %@"
+ "#ULPDRFenceBridge: Invalid radius value %@, must be positive"
+ "#ULPDRFenceBridge: No fence active -- ignoring request to clear fence"
+ "#ULPDRFenceBridge: PDR fence completion error, PDR fence of source type: %@, completed with error: %@ and identifier %@"
+ "#ULPDRFenceBridge: PDR fence of source type: %@, completed sucessfully, with identifier: %@"
+ "#ULPDRFenceBridge: Requested PDR fence without an active session! Starting Motion Session with source type: %@"
+ "#ULPDRFenceBridge: Setting radius when fence is already active -- radius will *NOT BE APPLIED TO FENCE* "
+ "#ULPDRFenceBridge: Started CoreMotion PDR Fence session"
+ "#ULPDRFenceBridge: Started Neural PDR Fence session"
+ "#ULPDRFenceBridge: tried to create ULPDRFenceBridge with source type: %@"
+ "#homeslam - Trajectory Similarity - Failed projecting trajectory to 2D grid - GOT OOB index"
+ "#homeslam - Trajectory Similarity - Failed projecting trajectory to 2D grid - GOT OOB index (%lu, %lu)"
+ "#homeslam - Trajectory Similarity - Failed to fit trajectory %lu to grid - skipping"
+ "#homeslam - Trajectory Similarity - Failed to standardize path %lu in time interval (%Lf, %Lf)"
+ "#homeslam - Trajectory Similarity - segment: %lu in time interval (%Lf, %Lf) filtered out for trajectory matching due to: *floor change suspect*"
+ "#homeslam - Trajectory Similarity - segment: %lu in time interval (%Lf, %Lf) filtered out for trajectory matching due to: *has no fingerprints*"
+ "#homeslam - Trajectory Similarity - segment: %lu in time interval (%Lf, %Lf) filtered out for trajectory matching due to: *is a super segment*"
+ "#homeslam - Trajectory Similarity - segment: %lu in time interval (%Lf, %Lf) filtered out for trajectory matching due to: *total displacement criteria*"
+ "#homeslam - Trajectory Similarity - segment: %lu in time interval (%Lf, %Lf) filtered out for trajectory matching due to: *total path length*"
+ "#homeslam - ULEndpointClusteringAlgorithm::getClusterLabels - Running computeWalkingTrajectoryDistanceMatrix"
+ "#homeslam, HomeSLAM Learner - Trajectory Shape - Missing value of FP pair (%s, %s) [indicator (%d, %d), 0=missing] - missing in uuid in map"
+ "#homeslam, ReplayPhase - label localization failed - localizer failed to produce results"
+ "#homeslam, ReplayPhase - label localized at (x,y,z)=(%f,%f,%f)"
+ "#homeslam, ReplayPhase - scan event with photo features localization failed - localizer failed to produce results"
+ "#homeslam, ReplayPhase - scan event with photo features localized at (x,y,z)=(%f,%f,%f)"
+ "#homeslam, Trajectory Shape Similarity - Checking match for (%lu,%lu) - rejected due to: *NCC too high*"
+ "#homeslam, Trajectory Shape Similarity - Checking match for (%lu,%lu) - rejected due to: *RF distance*"
+ "#homeslam, Trajectory Shape Similarity - Checking match for (%lu,%lu) - rejected due to: *displacement vectorial diff magnitude mismatch*"
+ "#homeslam, Trajectory Shape Similarity - Checking match for (%lu,%lu) - rejected due to: *start / end insufficient match*"
+ "#homeslam, Trajectory Shape Similarity - Checking match for (%lu,%lu) - rejected due to: *total path length or displacement diff magnitude mismatch*"
+ "#homeslam, Trajectory Shape Similarity - Computing NCC for trajectory pair (%lu,%lu)"
+ "#homeslam, Trajectory Shape Similarity - Trajectory pair (%lu,%lu) - Encountered normalization factor ~ 0 - aborting match attempt"
+ "#homeslam, Trajectory Shape Similarity - Trajectory pair (%lu,%lu) - max correlation offset OOB for non aliased region- aborting match attempt"
+ "#homeslam, Trajectory Shape Similarity got NCC Distance: %f for trajectory pair (%lu,%lu)"
+ "#homeslam, Trajectory Similarity - crossCorrelateFloatImages expects width to be a power of 2"
+ "#homeslam, Trajectory Similarity - crossCorrelateFloatImages expects width=height"
+ "#homeslam, Trajectory Similarity - generateGraphFromTrajectory - Something went wrong got an index out of bounds"
+ "#homeslam, Trajectory Similarity - generateTrajectoryOn2DGrid - Illeagal Input"
+ "#homeslam, ULFusionHierarchicalClustering - Rejecting Trajectory Shape Connection due to RF rejection (linkageStep, idx1, idx2)=(%lu, %lu, %lu)"
+ "%K = %d"
+ "%K == %@"
+ "%K > %f"
+ "(%.2f, %.2f, %.2f, yaw:%.2f°)"
+ "(%.2f,%.2f,%.2f,yaw:%.2f°)"
+ "(centerX.size() == centerY.size()) && (centerY.size() == centerZ.size())"
+ "(queryX.size() == queryY.size()) && (queryY.size() == queryZ.size())"
+ "+[ULMapLabelMO createFromDO:withLabelMO:modelMO:inManagedObjectContext:]"
+ ",\n"
+ ", blueDots={\n"
+ ", confidence="
+ ", deviceClass="
+ ", isMotionDetected="
+ ", isNullCluster="
+ ", isTracked="
+ ", particlePercentage="
+ ", rfProbabilityVector="
+ ", status={isUpdatedRfScanRequired="
+ ", submapIndex="
+ ", yaw="
+ "-[ULAttitudeProvider didReceiveAttitudeUpdate:withError:]"
+ "-[ULAttitudeProvider initWithQueue:delegate:bridgeType:]"
+ "-[ULLogicAdapter requestMapReconstructionForConnectionToken:requestIdentifier:]"
+ "-[ULLogicAdapter updateHomeKitUserInteractionLabelForConnectionToken:label:]"
